allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\LyraStarterGame" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Folder=$_.Name; SizeMB=[math]::Round\($size/1MB,1\)} } | Sort-Object SizeMB -Descending)
